examples.title: ResNet Block Forward Pass
examples.code:
FUNCTION ResidualBlock(x):
    identity = x
    x = Conv2D(64, (3,3))(x)
    x = BatchNorm()(x)
    x = ReLU()(x)
    x = Conv2D(64, (3,3))(x)
    x = Add()([x, identity])
    RETURN ReLU()(x)
examples.explanation: Implements skip connection by adding original input to transformed features
